scripts.dev: concurrently --kill-others-on-fail --names "api,log,proxy,frontend" --prefix-colors "blue,green,yellow,magenta" "node --env-file=api-server/.env api-server/index.js" "node --env-file=log-server/.env log-server/index.js" "node --env-file=reverse-proxy/.env reverse-proxy/index.js" "npm run dev --prefix frontend"
